description: DNS Resolution failure for SMTP provider.
resolution: Updated local /etc/hosts as temporary fix and flushed CoreDNS cache.

description: Load Balancer state table saturation (UDP Flood).
resolution: Implemented rate-limiting at the edge firewall and adjusted connection timeout.

description: NPE in CheckoutService during VAT calculation.
resolution: Added null check for user country code before calling TaxService API.

description: Database deadlock in transactions table.
resolution: Applied row-level locking and reordered the update sequence in the worker script.

description: High latency in Inventory service due to Redis connection leak.
resolution: Refactored the connection pooler to ensure clients are returned to the pool in a finally block.

description: Fluentd memory leak causing OOMKilled events.
resolution: Updated Fluentd to v1.14 and adjusted buffer chunk limits.

description: Expired SSL certificate on payments API.
resolution: Renewed certificate via Cert-Manager and added automated monitoring alerts for expiration.

description: Data SREonsistency due to DB replication lag.
resolution: Forced sensitive reads to the primary node and optimized long-running queries on the replica.

description: Brute force attack on login endpoint.
resolution: Enabled Cloudflare WAF rules to block the offending CIDR block and enforced MFA.

description: PDF generation timeout for large invoices.
resolution: Moved PDF generation to an asynchronous Celery task with a webhook notification.

description: S3 object corruption via lifecycle policy.
resolution: Reverted the lifecycle rule and restored affected objects from versioning.

description: CORS error on staging CDN access.
resolution: Added the staging origin to the AllowedOrigins list in the S3/CloudFront bucket config.

description: Elasticsearch CPU spike due to unoptimized aggregations.
resolution: Implemented query filtering and limited the 'size' parameter for bucket aggregations.

description: WebSocket handshake failures in Live Chat.
resolution: SREreased the proxy_read_timeout and proxy_send_timeout in the Nginx ingress controller.

description: CI/CD deployment failure - Docker image not found.
resolution: Fixed the tagging logic in the Jenkinsfile and verified registry credentials.

description: Client-side memory leak in React frontend.
resolution: Wrapped the event listener cleanup in the useEffect return statement.

description: Internal DoS via infinite loop in migration script.
resolution: Killed the rogue process and added a safety break condition in the loop.

description: OIDC auth failure due to clock skew.
resolution: Resynced NTP on all application servers and SREreased the token leeway.

description: Static image 404s after Nginx config change.
resolution: Updated the 'root' directive in the server block to point to the correct directory.

description: DB Server disk saturation - unrotated audit logs.
resolution: Purged old log files and configured logrotate for the /var/log/audit directory.

description: VPN packet loss - Inter-office slowness.
resolution: Adjusted MTU size to 1400 to prevent fragmentation over the ISP backhaul.

description: SQL Injection attempt blocked by WAF.
resolution: Sanitized the input parameter and implemented prepared statements in the legacy DAO.

description: Nightly backup failure - permission denied.
resolution: Corrected the UID/GID on the NFS mount point to match the backup user.

description: Buffer overflow in legacy Video Service.
resolution: Implemented bounds checking before memory allocation in the processing loop.

description: API Quota exceeded - Google Maps 429.
resolution: Implemented client-side caching for geocoding results and optimized API calls.

description: Process zombies causing system degradation.
resolution: Patched the parent process to properly handle SIGCHLD signals.

description: Stripe Webhook JSON parse error.
resolution: Updated the local webhook handler to accommodate the new payload schema.

description: DB Search performance hit - index fragmentation.
resolution: Ran an 'OPTIMIZE TABLE' command and scheduled weekly index rebuilds.

description: Stack overflow in recursive search function.
resolution: Converted the recursive function to an iterative approach using a stack data structure.

description: RabbitMQ connection failure - expired credentials.
resolution: Rotated the RabbitMQ user password and updated the Vault secrets.

description: No space left on /tmp - File uploads failing.
resolution: Cleared old temp files and SREreased the /tmp partition size.

description: TypeScript type error in Checkout UI.
resolution: Added a fallback value for the 'total' property and fixed the interface definition.

description: Terraform configuration drift - Production risk.
resolution: Imported the state correctly and enabled 'prevent_destroy' on the bucket resource.

description: TLS 1.3 Handshake timeout on legacy browsers.
resolution: Enabled TLS 1.2 as a fallback in the Nginx SSL configuration.

description: Service outage after failed Kernel update.
resolution: Booted from a previous kernel version via GRUB and disabled unattended-upgrades for the kernel.

description: Race condition - Duplicate ticket numbers.
resolution: Implemented an atomic SRErement counter in Redis for ticket ID generation.

description: S3 Bucket policy error - CDN access denied.
resolution: Corrected the Bucket Policy to allow 'GetObject' from the CloudFront Origin Access Identity.

description: AD Sync failure - Port 389 blocked.
resolution: Opened port 389/636 in the internal security group for the sync server.

description: Latency degradation due to noisy neighbor.
resolution: Migrated the affected high-traffic database to a dedicated instance.

description: Custom font loading blocked by CSP.
resolution: Added the font provider URL to the 'font-src' directive in the CSP header.

description: 5xx error spike after WAF 'Strict' mode enabled.
resolution: White-listed valid internal health check requests that were being flagged as malicious.

description: Redis cache corruption - Cross-user data leak.
resolution: Flushed the cache and added user-specific prefixes to all session keys.

description: Report upload error - Encoding mismatch (UTF-16).
resolution: Added an encoding detection layer to convert files to UTF-8 before processing.

description: FCM Push notification failure - expired key.
resolution: Generated a new FCM server key and updated the environment secrets.

description: DB disconnection - Connection pool exhaustion.
resolution: SREreased the 'max_connections' in PostgreSQL and optimized the pool size in the app.

description: SREorrect geolocation via outdated GeoIP DB.
resolution: Automated the weekly update of the MaxMind GeoIP database.

description: GTM script blocking FCP - Slow page load.
resolution: Added the 'async' and 'defer' attributes to the Google Tag Manager script tag.

description: MongoDB schema validation failure.
resolution: Updated the collection validation rules to match the new application model.

description: Container Orchestrator crash - API Server OOM.
resolution: Vertical scaling of the control plane nodes and optimized log verbosity.

description: Login failure and password reset email not delivered.
resolution: Found that the SendGrid API key had hit its monthly limit; rotated to a secondary key and cleared the mail queue.

description: Portal access blocked and reset links failing to arrive.
resolution: Identified a misconfigured SPF record that was causing major ISPs to reject our reset emails as spam. Corrected the DNS record.

description: Authentication blocked and verification emails not sending.
resolution: The worker service responsible for processing the email queue was stuck in a 'zombie' state due to an OOM error. Restarted the pod.

description: Website downtime due to organic traffic surge.
resolution: Manually scaled the Kubernetes replica set from 5 to 20 pods and enabled auto-scaling triggers based on CPU utilization.

description: Website inaccessible due to malicious traffic (DDoS).
resolution: Activated 'Under Attack' mode in Cloudflare and implemented a rate-limiting rule to block requests from non-residential IP ranges.

description: Site down due to excessive internal service-to-service traffic.
resolution: Identified a circular dependency in the logging middleware causing a traffic loop. Patched the middleware and restarted the network interface.

description: Final step payment failure due to Stripe 402 (Declined).
resolution: Identified that the 3D Secure 2.0 (3DS2) handshake was failing for international cards; enabled SCA-ready authentication in the checkout flow.

description: Payment failure at last step due to database schema mismatch.
resolution: Discovered the 'order_total' field in the DB was restricted to 2 decimal places, causing a crash on items with fraction-of-a-cent discounts. SREreased precision to 4 decimals.

description: Payment timeout at final processing stage.
resolution: Found that the Idempotency-Key header was being reused for different transactions due to a caching bug, causing the processor to reject the second attempt.
